title: Mosaic
description: An interactive computational-geometry studio: Voronoi by both half-plane intersection and Fortune's sweep-line, power (Laguerre) diagrams with their regular-triangulation dual, the farthest-point Voronoi diagram, Delaunay and constrained Delaunay (Lawson edge-flips), convex hulls by both monotone chain and Quickhull, the β-skeleton family (Gabriel↔RNG) and k-nearest graph alongside the full proximity-graph nesting, alpha shapes with an animated α sweep, Ruppert quality meshing, rotating-calipers metrics, Welzl's enclosing circle, largest empty circle, Lloyd and power-Lloyd relaxation, and a Spatial Search explorer — k-d trees and quadtrees driving live nearest-neighbour, k-nearest, orthogonal-range and jump-and-walk point-location queries (each verified against brute force), plus Yao/Θ/greedy geometric spanners with a measured dilation. Every algorithm is built from scratch, with a 91-check test suite.
